evals.prompt: I have a Next.js app with a features section that has 6 cards in a grid. I want them to fade in and slide up one by one as the user scrolls down to them. Use motion.
evals.expected_output: A React component using motion's whileInView and staggerChildren for scroll-triggered staggered card reveal, with 'use client' directive for Next.js

evals.prompt: Build me a confirmation dialog component in React that fades in with a backdrop blur, scales up from 95%, and animates out when dismissed. Use the motion library.
evals.expected_output: A modal component using AnimatePresence correctly (staying mounted), with backdrop + dialog exit animations, spring physics

evals.prompt: Create a horizontal image carousel in React where users can drag to scroll through items with momentum/snap behavior. Use motion for the physics.
evals.expected_output: A drag carousel using motion's drag='x', dragConstraints, dragElastic, and dragTransition for physics-based momentum scrolling
